value.rationale: The Agent Manager Panel is a UI panel within Google Antigravity that allows users to monitor and inspect background subagents running concurrently. It is a sub-feature of the managed agent runtime's subagents capability, specifically mapped to the existing product ID `google-antigravity-2-0-managed-agent-runtime-subagents-agent-manager-panel`. It primarily belongs to managed-agent-runtime (monitoring/managing the agent runtime's subagent execution), with a secondary touch on remote-agent-control (monitoring/directing agents asynchronously). The relation is partial since it covers only the monitoring/panel slice of the runtime, not the full runtime capability.
